# Curator Receipt

## Decision

Kept because the source is a serious empirical preprint with concrete dataset scale, methodology, and reported quantitative results.

## Why

The source is an unpublished research manuscript on arXiv that studies 2,303 agent context files across 1,925 repositories and reports explicit measured findings such as prevalence rates for instruction categories and maintenance patterns. That gives it real empirical substance rather than commentary or theorycrafting, so it meets the institute threshold.

## Limits
